category_sources: source_facts.description says parallel versions of OpenSSH and related tools; official README describes parallel OpenSSH tools including pssh, pscp, prsync, pnuke, and pslurp.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pssh; official README and repository describe PSSH / Parallel SSH Tools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary project documentation; repository also includes doc and man/man1 directories.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lilydjwg/pssh; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables and official README identify parallel SSH, SCP, rsync, kill, and slurp tools.
